name: Backlog Health
description: Backlog size, average age and stale percentage by project
query:
WITH latest AS (
    SELECT v_facts.project_key, MAX(v_facts.full_date) AS full_date
    FROM metrics.v_facts
    WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('backlog_size', 'backlog_avg_age_days', 'backlog_stale_pct')
      [[AND {{project_key}}]]
      [[AND {{date_range}}]]
    GROUP BY v_facts.project_key
),
scoped AS (
    SELECT v_facts.project_key, v_facts.calc_code, v_facts.value
    FROM metrics.v_facts
    JOIN latest l ON l.project_key = v_facts.project_key AND l.full_date = v_facts.full_date
    WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('backlog_size', 'backlog_avg_age_days', 'backlog_stale_pct')
)
SELECT
    project_key,
    MAX(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'backlog_size' THEN value END) AS total_backlog_size,
    MAX(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'backlog_avg_age_days' THEN value END) AS avg_age_days,
    MAX(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'backlog_stale_pct' THEN value END) AS stale_percentage
FROM scoped
GROUP BY project_key
ORDER BY total_backlog_size DESC NULLS LAST
